title: crotalaria longiclavata
intro: Crotalaria longiclavata is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria longiclavata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria longiclavata is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to support immune function and overall well-being.
